name: Mvp Jewelry & Pawn Shop
description_short: MVP Jewelry & Pawn, LLC is a Florida-based pawn shop located in West Miami offering collateral-based loans against jewelry, gold, and personal items.
description_long:
MVP Jewelry & Pawn, LLC was established on October 26, 2020, as a Florida Limited Liability Company with EIN 85-3618756. The company is registered at 1240 SW 57th Avenue in West Miami, Florida 33144, where it operates as a pawn shop serving the South Florida market. The business has maintained active status with the Florida Department of State, Division of Corporations since its filing date, with its most recent corporate amendment processed on March 21, 2022.

As a pawn shop, MVP Jewelry & Pawn provides collateral-based lending services, allowing customers to obtain short-term loans by pledging personal assets such as jewelry, gold, watches, and other valuables as security. The company's name emphasizes its jewelry specialization, indicating a focus on precious metals and fine jewelry as primary collateral items. Pawn shops like MVP serve as alternatives to traditional lending institutions for consumers who need quick access to cash or lack traditional credit access.

MVP Jewelry & Pawn maintains regular corporate compliance, having filed annual reports consistently in 2023, 2024, and 2025, demonstrating ongoing business operations. The company is managed by registered agent Yeny A. Espildora Ramos, who holds the title of Authorized Member (AMBR), indicating active management of the LLC. The consistency of annual filings and current active status suggests a stable, established operation within the pawn shop sector.

Consumers considering pawn shop services should understand that while collateral-based loans offer immediate liquidity without credit checks, they involve pledging personal property at risk of loss if loans are not repaid. Pawn transactions typically involve lower loan amounts relative to item value, and failing to retrieve pledged items within the loan period results in permanent loss of those assets. MVP's specialization in jewelry suggests competitive pricing within that specific category, though individual terms and loan-to-value ratios are not disclosed in public corporate records.
pros: Active, compliant Florida LLC with consistent annual reporting (2023-2025)
Jewelry specialization suggests expertise in valuing precious metals and fine jewelry
Located in West Miami with established brick-and-mortar presence at fixed address
No credit check required for collateral-based loans
Immediate access to cash without traditional lending approval processes
Licensed and regulated pawn operation subject to Florida pawn shop regulations
cons: Limited public information available about specific loan terms, interest rates, or loan-to-value ratios
Pledged items are forfeited permanently if loan is not repaid within the agreed period
Pawn loans typically offer lower cash advances relative to actual item value
No website or online presence indicated in corporate filings for customer information access
Restricted to collateral-based lending only; does not provide unsecured personal loans
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own jewelry, gold, or valuable items
Individuals without traditional credit or banking relationships
People seeking short-term liquidity without credit checks or income verification
diagnosis: MVP Jewelry & Pawn is best for individuals with jewelry, gold, or valuable items who need immediate cash and lack access to traditional credit. The main caveat is that collateral-based pawn loans involve risk of permanent asset loss if the loan is not repaid within the agreed timeframe, and customers should carefully evaluate whether they can reliably redeem pledged items before committing personal valuables.
services: Short-term cash advances secured by personal valuables
Quick approval and same-day funding capability typical of pawn operations
